description: Five-phase portfolio management pipeline covering construction, attribution, risk monitoring, rebalancing, and reporting. Coordinates 11 specialist agents across sequential and cyclical phases to produce a terminal verdict of BALANCED, REBALANCE, or DISTRESSED. Phase 3 (Risk Monitoring) is recurring quarterly. Cross-chain handoffs: inbound from fund-management (mandate updates) and hold-period (asset-level quarterly data); outbound to fund-management (distribution/capital call coordination) and investment-strategy (acquisition target profiles). Terminal deliverable is the LP quarterly report package with traffic-light dashboard, rebalancing recommendations, and distribution projections.

outputs: portfolio asset inventory with aggregates
multi-dimensional allocation matrix (property type, geography, vintage, risk, leverage)
composite drift score and portfolio alignment status
gap analysis with dollar amounts and priority ranking
benchmark comparison with tracking error and active share

validationRules.description: Allocation percentages within each dimension must sum to 100% (tolerance 0.1%).
Every asset in portfolio config must appear in inventory or be logged as data gap.
Composite drift score must be computed from all 6 allocation dimensions.

outputs: tenant concentration with HHI and industry analysis
lease maturity wall analysis with WALT
geographic correlation and climate risk mapping
lender and debt concentration with risk interactions
aggregate concentration heat map with breach flags

validationRules.description: All concentration dimensions must produce a score between 0-100.
Any metric exceeding Warning threshold must generate a breach flag.
Aggregate portfolio concentration score must be computed from dimension scores.

outputs: property-level return decomposition (income, appreciation, leverage)
portfolio-level TWR and IRR
Brinson attribution (asset selection, allocation, interaction alpha)
alpha persistence and information ratio
gross-to-net fee bridge with spread classification

validationRules.description: Income + appreciation + leverage must equal total gross return within 25bps.
Selection + allocation + interaction alpha must equal total alpha within 10bps.
Fee bridge must show every fee layer from gross to net-to-LP.

inputs: peer fund returns by strategy and vintage
outputs: NCREIF comparison (total, income, appreciation, by type/region)
ODCE comparison with leverage adjustment
peer fund quartile and percentile ranking
same-store NOI comparison vs market
composite performance scorecard and rating

validationRules.description: At least one benchmark comparison (NCREIF or ODCE) must be non-null.
Composite performance rating must be one of OUTPERFORMING, AT_MARKET, UNDERPERFORMING, SIGNIFICANTLY_UNDERPERFORMING.

inputs: per-asset debt schedules and covenant terms
outputs: maturity wall analysis with refinancing risk
rate exposure classification and sensitivity
CECL reserve adequacy assessment
covenant compliance dashboard
rolling quarterly watchlist
consolidated traffic-light debt dashboard

validationRules.description: All five debt dimensions must have a traffic light (GREEN/YELLOW/RED).
All prior-quarter watchlist items must be accounted for (remain, removed with reason, or escalated).

outputs: portfolio physical risk score by hazard
portfolio transition risk assessment
TCFD-aligned four-pillar report
composite climate risk score and category
climate risk recommendations

validationRules.description: Physical risk score must be calculated across at least 3 hazard types.
All four TCFD pillars (governance, strategy, risk management, metrics) must be addressed.

inputs: cap rate and vacancy trend data
outputs: submarket supply risk scores
submarket demand strength scores
supply-demand balance with portfolio exposure
market cycle positioning per submarket
consolidated market exposure dashboard with recommendations

validationRules.description: Every submarket with portfolio exposure must have supply and demand scores.
Each submarket must be assigned a cycle phase (recovery, expansion, hypersupply, recession).

outputs: priority-ranked sell candidates with sell scores
acquisition target profiles for portfolio gaps
tax-efficient execution sequence (1031, installment, taxable)
pro forma portfolio with drift reduction verification
multi-year phased execution timeline with costs
execution risk assessment with contingency plans

validationRules.description: Pro forma portfolio composite drift must be lower than current (or deviation must be explained).
Every sell candidate must have a sell score (0-100) with at least 2 supporting reasons.
Execution timeline must have at least 3 phases with specific actions per phase.

inputs: per-asset NOI and cash flow projections
outputs: 24-month rolling cash flow projection
reserve adequacy assessment with stress tests
distribution capacity with waterfall allocation
capital call pacing and LP liquidity assessment
rebalancing feasibility verdict

validationRules.description: Inflows minus outflows must equal cumulative balance change for each period.
Reserve ratio must be calculated and categorized (WELL_RESERVED through INADEQUATE).
Rebalancing feasibility must be FEASIBLE, FEASIBLE_WITH_MODIFICATIONS, or NOT_FEASIBLE.

outputs: master traffic-light dashboard with health score
allocation visualization data (charts, heat maps)
performance visualization data (waterfall, comparison, ranking)
risk dashboard visualization data
LP quarterly report package (ILPA-compliant if institutional)

validationRules.description: Master dashboard must have a traffic light for every dimension and an overall health score.
Overall portfolio verdict must be BALANCED, REBALANCE, or DISTRESSED.
LP report package must include executive summary, performance, risk, and liquidity sections.

inputs: per-asset rent rolls with floor assignments
outputs: floor-by-floor occupancy grid per eligible asset
lease rollover grid by floor and time period
contiguous availability analysis
portfolio-level stacking summary

validationRules.description: Every asset must be classified as FULL, PARTIAL, or INELIGIBLE for stacking plan.
Units per floor must sum to building total for each eligible asset.

inbound.trigger: Fund mandate update or constraint change
inbound.action: Update portfolio config and trigger re-evaluation if constraints tightened
Update asset data store and trigger portfolio review cycle when all assets current

outbound.trigger: Distribution or capital call coordination needed
outbound.action: Hand off distribution and capital call data for fund-level processing

outbound.trigger: Acquisition target profiles defined from rebalancing
outbound.action: Hand off acquisition target profiles for market research and deal sourcing

outbound.trigger: Sell recommendation from rebalancing or DISTRESSED verdict
outbound.action: Hand off disposition candidates for marketing and execution

challengeLayer.activationCriteria: Terminal verdict determined or rebalancing plan finalized
